## Relationship Graph

*Workspace-rooted entity hierarchy:*


```
workspaces
├─ users                      (workspace_id FK)
├─ personas                   (workspace_id FK)
├─ campaigns                  (workspace_id FK)
│   └─ feedback               (campaign_id FK)
├─ brand_assets               (workspace_id FK)
├─ workspace_settings         (workspace_id FK — 1:1)
├─ brand_memory_entries       (workspace_id — no FK, text key)
├─ identity_signals           (workspace_id — no FK, text key)
└─ identity_versions          (workspace_id — no FK, text key)

(workspace-scoped telemetry / audit)
├─ brandos_artifact_approvals (workspace_id — text, no FK)
├─ brandos_artifact_versions  (workspace_id — text, no FK)
├─ brandos_governance_audit   (workspace_id — text, no FK)
└─ cp_telemetry               (user_id — no workspace FK)

(global / platform)
├─ brandos_admin_settings     (platform-level, no workspace FK)
├─ brandos_provider_credentials (global, no workspace FK)
└─ brandos_provider_health    (global, no workspace FK)
```

### `workspace_provider_health`

**Owner:** *(unknown)*

**Primary keys:** `id`

**Columns:**
  - `id` — uuid `NOT NULL` default `gen_random_uuid()`
  - `workspace_id` — uuid `NOT NULL`
  - `provider` — text `NOT NULL`
  - `last_success_at` — timestamp with time zone
  - `last_failure_at` — timestamp with time zone
  - `failure_count` — integer `NOT NULL` default `0`
  - `last_validated_at` — timestamp with time zone
  - `updated_at` — timestamp with time zone `NOT NULL` default `now()`

**Indexes:**

  - `workspace_provider_health_one_row_per_provider`

  - `request_id` — text

  - `completion_tokens` — integer

### `workspace_settings`

**Owner:** @brandos/auth
**Readers:** @brandos/auth, @brandos/control-plane-layer
**Writers:** @brandos/auth, @brandos/control-plane-layer

**Primary keys:** `workspace_id`

**Columns:**

  - `preferred_provider` — text
  - `runtime_mode` — text
  - `governance_score_threshold` — numeric

  - `asset_storage_limit_mb` — integer

### `workspaces`

**Owner:** @brandos/auth
**Readers:** @brandos/auth, @brandos/control-plane-layer
**Writers:** @brandos/auth

**Primary keys:** `id`

**Columns:**
  - `id` — uuid `NOT NULL` default `gen_random_uuid()`
  - `name` — text `NOT NULL`
  - `slug` — text `NOT NULL`
  - `owner_id` — uuid `NOT NULL`
  - `plan` — text `NOT NULL` default `'explorer'::text`
  - `created_at` — timestamp with time zone `NOT NULL` default `now()`
  - `updated_at` — timestamp with time zone `NOT NULL` default `now()`

**Foreign keys:**
  *(none)*

**Indexes:**
  - `workspaces_owner_id_idx`
  - `workspaces_pkey`
  - `workspaces_slug_key`

## Database Validation

*Run at generation time against `schema_inventory.json`.*

### Orphan Tables (in schema, no ownership mapping)

- `brandos_score_history` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs
- `figma_handoff_tokens` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs
- `workspace_api_keys` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs
- `workspace_oauth_connections` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs
- `workspace_provider_health` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs
- `workspace_provider_usage` — add to TABLE_OWNERSHIP in generate-database-context.mjs

### Missing Tables (in ownership map, absent from schema)

*(none — schema and ownership map agree)*

### Orphaned Ownership (owner package deleted, no current writer)

These tables have a TABLE_OWNERSHIP entry, so they are not "orphan tables" in the sense above, but their owning package no longer exists in the codebase — nothing currently writes them. This is not something a generator should silently resolve; it requires a human decision (archive-and-drop vs. migrate into IntelligenceOS as historical seed data — see BrandOS architecture review, Gap G-B2).

- `brand_memory_entries` — formerly owned by `@brandos/brand-intelligence` (deleted)
- `identity_signals` — formerly owned by `@brandos/brand-intelligence` (deleted)
- `identity_versions` — formerly owned by `@brandos/brand-intelligence` (deleted)

### Ownership Violations

*(Full static-analysis ownership violation detection requires source scanning — planned for future iteration.)*

### Dead Tables (schema present, no code references)

*(Requires source scanning — not implemented in this generator. Run `node scripts/lint-imports.mjs` for reference coverage.)*
